Class RowLevelStrategy

Isolation strategy: all tenants share tables. Every table has a TenantId column. EF Core global query filters automatically scope all queries. Cheapest to operate. Recommended for low-risk SaaS.

This strategy is applied automatically by MultitenantDbContext. Entities must implement ITenantEntity.

Methods

| Edit this page View Source

Apply(ModelBuilder, Func<string?>)

Configures the model for row-level tenant isolation. Applies ApplyTenantQueryFilters(ModelBuilder, Func<string?>) to all ITenantEntity entity types and adds a TenantId index for performance.

Declaration
public static void Apply(ModelBuilder modelBuilder, Func<string?> getCurrentTenantId)
Parameters

ModelBuilder modelBuilder
Func<string> getCurrentTenantId
